title: Father Figure
why_this_song: Father Figure by George Michael (1987) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "W-h-o-a baby"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I will be your father figure"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Maybe this time is forever say it can be"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I will be your father figure"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "That's all I wanted"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I will be your father figure
Put your tiny hand in mine
I will be your preacher teacher
Something special something sacred in your eyes
For just one moment to be bold and naked at your side
Sometimes I think that you never understand me (understand me)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "baby" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "baby" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "father" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "father" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Just to see my baby's blue eyes shine
My love is always telling me so

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Something special something sacred in your eyes
I have had enough of crime

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Father Figure" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Father Figure", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Father Figure" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Father Figure" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Father Figure", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Father Figure", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
